basic_details.job_title: DLSA Hathras Member Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Hathras (DLSA Hathras) Recruitment 2026: District Legal Services Authority Hathras has released the official notification for 2 Member, Permanent Lok Adalat posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Adequate experience in public utility services (transport by air/road/water, postal/telegraph/telephone, power/light/water supply, public conservancy/sanitation, hospital/dispensary, insurance)
qualification.details: Member, Permanent Lok Adalat: Adequate experience in public utility services (transport by air/road/water, postal/telegraph/telephone, power/light/water supply, public conservancy/sanitation, hospital/dispensary, insurance).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 2000/- per sitting and Rs. 5000/- per month conveyance allowance
salary_details.details: Rs. 2000/- per sitting and Rs. 5000/- per month conveyance allowance

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Hathras Member, Permanent Lok Adalat Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DLSA Hathras Member, Permanent Lok Adalat Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the DLSA Hathras Member, Permanent Lok Adalat posts is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Member, Permanent Lok Adalat post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the position of Member, Permanent Lok Adalat in the District Legal Services Authority Hathras recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Member, Permanent Lok Adalat position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess adequate experience in public utility services, including transport, postal, electricity, water, sanitation, hospital, and insurance sectors, to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Member, Permanent Lok Adalat posts in DLSA Hathras. This makes the application process more accessible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Member, Permanent Lok Adalat post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive Rs. 2000/- per sitting and a conveyance allowance of Rs. 5000/- per month for the Member, Permanent Lok Adalat position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for DLSA Hathras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the DLSA Hathras Member, Permanent Lok Adalat Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Legal Services Authority Hathras. Please check the 'Important Links' section for the direct link.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates, along with the filled application form.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Member, Permanent Lok Adalat posts in DLSA Hathras is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for DLSA Hathras?
faq.answer: The official website for District Legal Services Authority Hathras can be found in the 'Important Links' section. It is advisable to visit the website for any updates or further information.
